mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND followee_id = #{followeeId}

SELECT * FROM user_follows
AND follower_id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{followerName}, '%'))
AND followee_id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{followeeName}, '%'))
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follows
AND follower_id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{followerName}, '%'))
AND followee_id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{followeeName}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follows (follower_id, followee_id, created_at) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followeeId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND followee_id = #{followeeId}
